description: A back-office analyst ensures that a physical cargo trade is settled correctly, meaning the payment is made and the title is transferred.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the details of the completed trade, including the final volume, price, and counterparty.

expected_outcome.value: The final deal ticket is retrieved from the trade capture system.

nodes.task_description: Generate an invoice and send it to the counterparty.

expected_outcome.value: A correct invoice is created and sent.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the payment has been received and then issue a confirmation of title transfer to the buyer.

expected_outcome.value: The payment is confirmed, title transfer is complete, and the trade is marked as 'Settled'.
